title: Streamer iGumdrop takes her cooking from Twitch to MasterChef and impresses Gordon Ramsay
summary_full: Twitch sensation iGumdrop, known for her online food streams, is now a contestant on MasterChef Global Gauntlet, representing Team Asia-Pacific. She impressed Gordon Ramsay with her wagyu beef satay, aiming to put Malaysian cuisine on the global map. Securing her white apron, iGumdrop proved her culinary skills extend beyond the internet.
